*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Sacral region / Measures 3.1 cm x 2.5 cm / Stage: Stage 2
Drainage present - serosanguineous, none. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Wound note - Sacralrgn. Meas 3.1x2.5x0.2cm. None serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 46% gran, 54% slough. Periwound erythematous. NPWT canister changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Johansson notified.
